videoTitle: Khan Sir on India’s Reality, Government, Education System, Politics & Poverty | FO497 Raj Shamani

clips.title: India’s DEADLY Geopolitical Mistake 🇮🇳
clips.description: Khan Sir explains the massive strategic error India is making on the global stage regarding its neighbors and superpowers.
clips.viral_reason: Geopolitics is Khan Sir's bread and butter. Gen Z loves high-stakes 'desh-bhakti' takes that challenge the status quo of the government's foreign policy.
clips.hook: Sabsé badi galti jo hum kar rahe hain...
clips.caption: Is India making a huge mistake? 😱 Khan Sir reveals the truth. #India #Geopolitics #KhanSir

clips.title: AI is coming for your JOB 🤖
clips.description: A brutal reality check on how AI and privatization will make traditional degrees useless and lead to mass unemployment.
clips.viral_reason: Fear-mongering about the future of jobs is a guaranteed save-and-share for students and young professionals.
clips.hook: Insaan ki jagah ab machine legi, lekin...
clips.caption: Your degree won't save you from AI. 📉 #AI #Jobs #Future #KhanSir

clips.title: The Medical Mafia EXPOSED 🏥
clips.description: Khan Sir explains why he provides low-cost treatment and how the current healthcare system is designed to keep people in debt.
clips.viral_reason: Calling out the 'Medical Mafia' or expensive hospitals resonates with everyone who has struggled with bills. It positions him as a hero of the people.
clips.hook: Hospital ilaaj ke liye nahi, lootne ke liye bane hain.
clips.caption: Why hospitals want you to stay sick. 💉❌ #Healthcare #Exposed #KhanSir

clips.title: The ₹10,000 Crore Coaching SCAM 📚
clips.description: Khan Sir takes a direct shot at the NEET/JEE coaching industry 'mafia' that charges lakhs and exploits student desperation.
clips.viral_reason: The coaching industry (Kota/Delhi) is a hot topic. Gen Z students love seeing the 'big players' get called out for their greed.
clips.hook: Ye coaching wale bacchon ko loot rahe hain...
clips.caption: The truth about NEET/JEE coaching centers! 🚫📖 #NEET #JEE #EducationSystem

clips.title: How Bihar’s Elections are BOUGHT 🗳️
clips.description: A savage breakdown of how the voting system in Bihar is manipulated and why the state remains poor due to its own political cycle.
clips.viral_reason: Political 'roasts' of specific states or systems always trigger massive engagement in the comments between supporters and critics.
clips.hook: Bihar mein vote bikta hai, aur kaise...
clips.caption: The dark reality of Bihar elections. 🗳️🔥 #Bihar #Politics #Election2024

clips.title: Who Profits from Religious Hate? 🚩☪️
clips.description: Khan Sir goes off-script to explain the business behind Hindu-Muslim hatred and who actually benefits from the fire.
clips.viral_reason: This is the most polarizing topic in India. A 'rational' take on religious beef from someone like Khan Sir is peak viral material.
clips.hook: Dharm ke naam pe ladayi kyun hoti hai?
clips.caption: The business of religious hate. 🧠🚫 #Unity #India #Religion

clips.title: Why You Will Stay POOR 💸
clips.description: A brutal explanation of the poverty cycle in India and why the system is designed to keep the poor at the bottom.
clips.viral_reason: Brutal honesty about wealth inequality triggers the 'algorithm' because it hits the pain points of the masses.
clips.hook: Gareeb hamesha gareeb kyun rehta hai?
clips.caption: The system wants you to stay poor. 📉💔 #Poverty #Success #HardTruth

clips.title: Rich Indians are BETRAYING India 🇮🇳❌
clips.description: Khan Sir calls out wealthy Indians who make their money here but invest it abroad or refuse to help develop the country.
clips.viral_reason: Calling out the 'Elite' or '1%' always gains traction with the general public. It's a classic 'Rich vs Poor' narrative.
clips.hook: Amir log India chhod kar kyun bhaag rahe hain?
clips.caption: Why rich Indians don’t care about India. 😤🚫 #Wealth #India #BrainDrain
